response.step_by_step_log: The on-screen text in the top-left corner identifies the song as 'はじまりの魔法-charm-'. The performers are identified as the 'Magical Girl holoWitches!' group (Hololive). I searched for '"はじまりの魔法-charm-" 魔法少女ホロウィッチ Japanese and English lyrics'. Multiple search results confirmed the song title and artist/group. The video shows the group performing this song in the first segment, followed by a dialogue scene. I included lyrics for the song.
response.global_summary: A video containing a song performance by the virtual idol group 'Magical Girl holoWitches!' (a sub-unit of Hololive), followed by a dialogue scene involving several of the characters. The song title is 'Hajimari no Mahou -charm-'.

scenes.description: The virtual idol group 'Magical Girl holoWitches!' performs the song 'Hajimari no Mahou -charm-' on a stage with a Halloween theme, including light effects and choreographed dance moves. The song title appears in the top-left corner.
scenes.performer_in_video: Magical Girl holoWitches! (天音かなた, さくらみこ, 姫森ルーナ, 宝鐘マリン, 紫咲シオン, 沙花叉クロヱ)
